title: In data validation we have option to select date but it is more convenient if time option is given
author: nandakumar-a
body:
## 🚀 Feature Proposal

first up all thank you for the great plugin. In data validation we have option to select date but it is more convenient if time option is given.

i found same issue that are already posted by someone https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/issues/1266#issue-615738613

## Motivation

I tried on ms office data validation i found there is an option to select time in allow option, so i feel it is more convenient if you put it on the plugin.

## Example

const timeColumn = row.getCell(8);
timeColumn.dataValidation = {
type : 'time',
operator: 'between',
allowBlank : true,
showErrorMessage : true,
errorStyle : 'error',
errorTitle : 'Invalid time',
error : 'The time value should between 00:00 to 23:59, Please make sure and try again',
formulae : [ "00:00","23:59" ],
};
